triage_rows.direction: do not promote while promotion_gate_state remains hold and the p1 rotation has not been explicitly accepted
promote snapshot first, then control packet, then rebaseline change signals in order
keep all accepted-state artifacts in shadow form until the manual acceptance step is complete

interpretation: The merge problem is now reduced to a human acceptance decision followed by a bounded rollout sequence.
No silent primary-consumer mutation is needed or allowed before that decision.
